name: Request Agent Task
description: Send a request to an agent and get a response. PRIMARY tool for agent delegation. Creates a tracked Job that completes when the agent finishes the task — use the standard Job lifecycle (e.g. REST ?wait= or SDK job.awaitResult()) to block or poll. Example: agent_request(agentId='Helper', input={task: 'summarise w/notes/daily', format: 'bullet list'}). For structured output, pass responseSchema (a JSON Schema) — the agent's response will conform to it. Otherwise the agent uses its own default response shape.

input.description: The request payload. MUST contain the actual instructions, data, or parameters the agent needs. NEVER pass an empty object {} — the worker has nothing to act on. Use field 'task' for free-form instructions; add other fields the worker needs (data, paths, options). Example: {task: 'summarise w/notes/daily', format: 'bullet list'}.

responseSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema. When provided, the agent's response is constrained to match this schema (server-side enforcement via OpenAI structured outputs). Use to get typed structured output from any agent. Overrides the agent's default output schema if it has one.

output.description: Agent's structured response to the request.
